title: Anabel Garcia Gonzalez | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Anabel Garcia Gonzalez

## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Anabel Garcia Gonzalez specializes in Immigration and Nationality Law, with experience in complex employment-based, self-sponsored, and family-based cases. Ms. Garcia has worked with several firms specializing in Business Immigration, representing a variety of individual and corporate clients in immigrant and nonimmigrant visa petitions, including O1-A, EB-1A, and EB-2 NIW. She has extensive experience representing clients in connection with Requests for Evidence (RFEs), as well as appeals before the Administrative Appeals Office (AAO).
As an immigrant and a professional herself, Ms. Garcia understands how challenging it is for immigrants to establish themselves in any given professional field, navigating the difficulties of language barriers, differences in the education system, and the complexities of the United States immigration system.

## Knowledge & Experience
- Juris Doctor (J.D.) – University of Miami School of Law (UM Health Rights Clinic — Immigration Intern)
- Master's Degree in International Law (LL.M.) – University of Miami School of Law
- Law Degree (LL.B.) – Universidad de La Habana, Cuba
She enjoys cooking, the beach, and outdoor activities with her family, friends, and her puppy. She also loves all kinds of music and dancing salsa.
